about.about: Information Systems graduate with a 3.88/4.00 GPA, specializing in AI engineering and data-driven solutions from data ingestion to deployment. Experienced in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), LLM orchestration, prompt engineering, vector databases, and scalable AI systems. Strong foundation in data analytics and machine learning, with a proven ability to build AI solutions that transform complex data into actionable business insights.
title: AI Engineer
Data Analyst
System Analyst

desc: Identified trends that led to a 15% increase in audience engagement through targeted social media strategies.
Achieved a 10% boost in search traffic by refining SEO plans and optimizing keyword usage.
Delivered data-driven recommendations that enhanced overall social media performance, resulting in a 12% growth in follower base.
Improved the efficiency of social media reporting processes, reducing the time spent on data analysis by 20%.

volunteers.company: PT Paragon Technology and Innovation - Novo Club Batch 3
desc: Increased environmental awareness among 2,000+ participants.
Achieved 500+ shares on campaign content, boosting engagement.
Inspired measurable actions, with 70% of viewers committing to small eco-friendly changes.
Expanded campaign reach through consistent posting on regional and personal accounts.
Enhanced content performance and scheduling by conducting engagement analysis with Google Analytics, resulting in a 15% increase in engagement rates.
Developed and implemented social media strategies that consistently met KPIs by aligning content with audience preferences and industry trends.
Delivered data-driven reports to stakeholders, enhancing content strategy through actionable insights.

educations.degree: Cloud and Gen AI Machine Learning
desc: Studied Cloud Computing on AWS, Advance Python, Machine Learning, and Generative AI as part of the Studi Independent - Kampus Merdeka program by the Ministry of Education.
Relevant courses include Computational Statistics, Computational Mathematics, Software Engineering, Database Systems, Database Administration, and Information Systems Analysis and Design.
Conducted competitor analysis and market evaluations using Python and Excel, improving decision-making efficiency by 80% across regions.
Delivered detailed reports uncovering key market trends and hidden opportunities, supporting strategic company initiatives.
Managed multiple data analysis projects with a 98% on-time completion rate, showcasing strong time management and project coordination skills.

Engineered an AI-powered career consultation chatbot using Python and the Qwen LLM, delivering personalized resume reviews, interview preparation, and career recommendations through natural language interactions.
Designed and deployed a highly available cloud architecture on AWS using EC2, Application Load Balancer, and Auto Scaling, ensuring fault tolerance and scalable application performance.
Developed an automated resume parsing application using PyMuPDF, extracting candidate information with 95% accuracy to reduce manual CV screening time by 75%.

Engineered a low-latency Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline using Next.js, Groq API, and Qdrant Cloud, delivering context-aware text generation with end-to-end response times below 2.5 seconds.

Optimized semantic retrieval by designing metadata-rich JSON schemas for character profiles, achieving a 90% evaluation pass rate for character consistency, contextual relevance, and response quality.

Developed a production-ready AI content ideation platform featuring automated context injection, intelligent query routing, and NextAuth-based access control, reducing manual content brainstorming time by 50%.

Engineered an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline using FastAPI, LangChain, and ChromaDB, parsing complex university regulations and achieving 89.5% Context Recall for accurate information retrieval.

Optimized retrieval performance by implementing Hybrid Search (Semantic + BM25), Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF), and a Cross-Encoder, achieving 80.9% Context Precision while improving contextual relevance across multiple document versions.

Implemented a high-precision OCR ingestion pipeline using Docling and regex-based text cleaning, automatically converting 50+ pages of scanned university regulations into structured Markdown for downstream retrieval and question answering.

main.name: Aisma Nurlaili
main.shortDesc: I specialize in turning data into powerful insights, creating impactful dashboards, and optimizing strategies to drive business success.

projects.name: Chatbot UPN
projects.techstack: Python, NextJS, TypeScript, FastAPI, Langchain, ChromaDB, Ollama, Gemma3, Supabase
projects.description: An academic assistant chatbot utilizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to make complex university regulations interactive. It uses structure-aware OCR to parse legal documents and dynamically prioritizes the most recent applicable rules.

projects.name: Alkesgo
projects.techstack: PHP, MySQL, Groq (LLM), Cohere, Supabase, pgvector, Chart.js
projects.description: An AI-powered healthcare e-commerce platform featuring a dual-agent architecture. It integrates an ultra-fast RAG chatbot for semantic customer support using Supabase pgvector, alongside a Text-to-SQL assistant that autonomously parses database schemas to render real-time business insights and charts for administrators.

projects.name: RAGsume
projects.description: A document intelligence application utilizing Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) that allows users to upload their resumes, ask specific questions, extract key skills, summarize professional experience, and evaluate job fit against job descriptions.

projects.techstack: Python, EC2, Application Load Balancing, Auto Scaling Group, SQL Alchemy, Qween LLM

projects.description: An automated writing tool that generates contextual and engaging comments for articles, blogs, or social media posts based on user input.
